half_life_analysis.recommendation: Consider increasing half-life; many events exceed current window.

i5_outcome_tracking.synthetic_data_note: Outcomes evaluated against known synthetic scenario events. HYPE events (min 20-35) precede observation midpoint (min 60) and register as miss. SOL events (min 65-80) fall within the outcome window and register as hit/partial. ETH/BTC baseline cards have no matching events -> miss (control).

threshold_recommendations.synthetic_data_caveat: Recommendations based on synthetic outcome tracking. Validate against live market data before applying changes.
